adjustments.effort: Keeping an extra rep in reserve today — $t({{driversKey}}).
adjustments.volume: One set less on the small stuff — $t({{driversKey}}).

progression.start: First session — start at the prescribed weight and own the range.
progression.addReps: Same weight — add a rep to your weakest set.
progression.consolidateNoReserve: Top of the range, but too close to failure — own it once more.
progression.consolidateEasier: You've earned more load, but not today — same weight, save the jump for a fresher day.
progression.addTechnique: Load is maxed for this setup — progress with a slower eccentric, a pause, or more range.
progression.increaseLoad: Every set topped the range with reps in reserve — time to add load.

coachInsight.easier: Adjusted for readiness and done anyway — that is the discipline that compounds.
coachInsight.loadsUp_one: Load went up on one exercise — double progression is doing its job.
coachInsight.loadsUp_other: Load went up on {{count}} exercises — double progression is doing its job.
coachInsight.effortsUp: You beat last time on reps — when the range is full, load comes next.
coachInsight.baselines: Baselines set. Everything from here is progress.
coachInsight.consistent: Consistent work at the same numbers — that is what compounds.

trends.firstWeekInProgress: Your first week is still in progress — check back once a few days have passed.
trends.noScheduledSessions: No scheduled sessions have fallen in this window yet.
trends.needMoreStrengthData: Log this exercise a few more times to see a strength trend.
trends.needMoreWaistData: A few more waist measurements will show a trend.
trends.spreadWaistMeasurements: Spread your measurements out over a couple of weeks to see a trend.
